goal: Fix WhatsApp group scan Flask sync 500 on long evaluation payload

plan.step: Read logs and identify root cause
plan.note: web logs showed value too long for varchar(255) during whatsapp_evaluations insert.
Short-name descriptor guard in parser; truncate_text in ingest upsert_evaluation.
npm parser tests and backend truncation test passed; web/login smoke OK; bot health OK.

notes: 500 caused by psycopg2 StringDataRightTruncation on whatsapp_evaluations student_name after relaxed parser treated long evaluation sentence as a name.
Parser now ignores long sentence descriptors as names; Flask truncates all varchar payload fields before insert/update.
Runtime web and whatsapp_bot rebuilt; bot session must be initialized/restored after recreate.
